overall.description: Aerial drone footage through a futuristic cyberpunk city waterfront at dusk, likely from Cyberpunk 2077. The camera smoothly ascends from canal level past neon-lit billboards and an elevated light rail system, revealing towering skyscrapers with flying vehicles passing overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic waterfront canal with elevated highway and monorail

events.description: flying vehicle passes overhead from right to left

agents.ego_description: piloting a drone upward from canal level, observing street traffic and neon signage along the waterfront

notable_agents.action: stream of cars driving along the waterfront road below
flying vehicle cruising above the canal against the gray sky

entered.detail: dark reflective water of the urban canal in the foreground
tall structure with multiple glowing advertisement screens and signage
elevated train track with vibrant rainbow LED lights underneath
multi-story brown building with visible parking levels and neon accents
moving cars and buses on the multi-lane road alongside the canal

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a low-altitude drone view of a futuristic canal waterfront. Dark water fills the foreground while a steady stream of traffic moves along the left side. A massive digital billboard structure stands prominently ahead, and an elevated monorail track with colorful lights runs along the right. A flying vehicle passes overhead as the camera begins its smooth ascent.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban canyon between high-rise buildings with neon facades

events.description: canal water exits bottom of frame as camera ascends above waterfront level
camera tilts upward to focus on the towering geometric skyscraper ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing to rise through the urban canyon, passing the digital billboard structure while approaching the central tower complex

notable_agents.action: flying vehicle hovering near the colorful monorail track

entered.detail: massive skyscraper with distinctive orange and white geometric facade patterns

segments.scene_description: As the drone ascends above the canal, the water disappears from view and the perspective shifts to an urban canyon between towering buildings. The digital billboard structure grows larger and closer while the central geometric tower dominates the skyline ahead. The colorful monorail track remains visible on the right, and flying vehicles navigate the airspace between buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: high-rise urban canyon with dense neon signage and sky bridges

events.description: steam or smoke rises from ventilation on the right-side building facade

agents.ego_description: gliding forward at high altitude through the skyscraper canyon, observing architectural details and neon signage on building facades

entered.detail: elevated walkway connecting two buildings with glass enclosure

segments.scene_description: At high altitude, the camera moves through a narrow canyon of skyscrapers with the canal and street traffic no longer visible. The central geometric tower looms large ahead while the colorful monorail track runs parallel on the right. Steam rises from building ventilation, and the scene is dominated by the imposing facades of the futuristic architecture with glowing windows and neon accents.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial ascent from a low-altitude canal waterfront into the depths of a towering cyberpunk urban canyon. It begins gliding over dark water beside a stream of traffic, passing beneath a flying vehicle as a massive digital billboard and a colorful monorail track frame the path ahead. As the drone climbs, the water disappears from view and the perspective shifts upward, bringing the central geometric tower into dominant focus while flying vehicles navigate the airspace between skyscrapers. The scene then expands into a high-altitude corridor of imposing architecture, where the street level vanishes and the camera pushes through a narrow canyon of glowing windows and neon accents. Finally, the movement culminates amidst rising steam from building ventilation, with the massive geometric tower looming large against the futuristic skyline.
